zh.lifeSummary: 當Eadgyth於大約1025年出生在維可時，她的父親Earl Aelfwine of Kent30歲，母親Wulfgyth East Anglia18歲。她與King Harold II of England結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1086年在英國英格蘭波藍德卡萊爾享年62歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾林肯。

zh-hans.Carlisle, Cumberland, Scotland: 英国英格兰波藍德卡萊爾
zh-hans.Battle of Hastings, Battle, Sussex, Engl: 英国英格兰素可芭特爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eadgyth于大约1025年出生在維可时，她的父亲Earl Aelfwine of Kent30岁，母亲Wulfgyth East Anglia18岁。她与King Harold II of England结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1086年在英国英格兰波藍德卡萊爾享年62岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾林肯。

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When Eadgyth was born about 1025, in Wessex, her father, Earl Aelfwine of Kent, was 30 and her mother, Wulfgyth East Anglia, was 18. She married King Harold II of England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1086, in Carlisle, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eadgyth est née environ 1025, à Wessex, son père, Earl Aelfwine of Kent, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Wulfgyth East Anglia, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé King Harold II of England. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1086, à Carlisle, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eadgyth um 1025 in Wessex geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Earl Aelfwine of Kent 30 und ihre Mutter Wulfgyth East Anglia 18. Sie hat King Harold II of England geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1086 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Carlisle, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eadgyth è nata il circa 1025 nel Wessex, sua padre, Earl Aelfwine of Kent, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Wulfgyth East Anglia, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato King Harold II of England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1086, nel Carlisle, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eadgythが約1025年にウエセックスで生まれた時，父Earl Aelfwine of Kentは30歳，母Wulfgyth East Angliaは18歳であった。King Harold II of Englandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1086年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドカーリスルで62歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eadgyth(이)가 대략 1025년 웨세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Earl Aelfwine of Kent(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Wulfgyth East Anglia(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 King Harold II of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1086년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 칼리슬일에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 링코컨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eadgyth nasceu aproximadamente 1025, em Wessex, seu pai, Earl Aelfwine of Kent, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Wulfgyth East Anglia, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com King Harold II of England. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1086, em Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eadgyth родилась около 1025 г. в местности вессекс, её отцу по имени Earl Aelfwine of Kent было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Wulfgyth East Anglia, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени King Harold II of England. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1086 г. в местности карлисл, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eadgyth nació aproximadamente 1025, en Wessex, su papá, Earl Aelfwine of Kent, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Wulfgyth East Anglia, tenía 18 años. Se casó con King Harold II of England. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1086, en Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
